Scenario: Employee has no dependents but plan covers ESC
Expected Behavior: Allow enrollment, prompt to add spouse/children later

Scenario: Employee adds parent but base plan is ESC only
Expected Behavior: Show inline premium in L2, configure coverage in L4 (no redirect loop)
UI Handling:
L2: "Parents not in base - ₹X additional"
L4: Parental coverage as pre-selected enhancement
Backend Handling: Calculate parental premium inline, flag as enhancement

Scenario: Plan allows ESCP, employee adds 2 parents
Spouse and children have different coverage (split family)
Downgrade from ESCP to ESC - parents become ineligible
Expected Behavior: Warn user, remove parents from coverage
Show pending status, retry in background
Allow, but warn about losing benefits
Hide tier selection, proceed as Vanilla

Scenario: Wallet insufficient for base plan minimum
User tries to spend wallet on restricted items
Expected Behavior: Block or warn based on config

Scenario: Add-on eligibility depends on base SI
Expected Behavior: Show/hide add-ons based on current SI selection

Scenario: Secondary plan has different waiting period
MP not met, plan not rolled out
Expected Behavior: Move user to alternate or base
Generate e-cards for all opted employees

Scenario: Employee joins mid-year, MP already decided
Expected Behavior: Direct enrollment to rolled-out plans only

Scenario: Policy issued mid-year, different start date
Previous policy had more dependents than current allows (e.g., 2 children → 1 child)
Expected Behavior: Prompt user to select which dependent to cover
UI Handling:
Selection UI: "Select which child to cover"
Clear policy limit messaging

Scenario: User must complete ALL layers for enrollment to register
Expected Behavior: Set expectation at L0, prevent partial submit
UI Handling:
L0: "Complete all steps to confirm"
Exit: "Selections won't be saved"

Scenario: User exits mid-flow (back nav, app close, timeout)
Backend Handling: Log stage, trigger comms, maintain draft

Expected Behavior: Warn about override, require full completion
UI Handling:
Modal: "New selections will override"
Show current summary
